title: hypericum carinatum
intro: Hypericum carinatum, also known as saw-wort, is a species of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hypericum carinatum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic, making it useful for treating minor cuts and scrapes. The herbal preparations of Hypericum carinatum can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
